evals.expected_output: SCSS block using Five-Group Vertical Rhythm (Layout → Dimensions → Content → Structure → Effects), each group separated by blank lines. Physical properties replaced: margin-left+margin-right → margin-inline, padding-right → padding-inline. No physical directional properties remain.

evals.prompt: Make the menu-grid component responsive. Add this to src/app/pages/menu/components/menu-grid/menu-grid.component.scss. On mobile it should be a 1-column layout, tablet 2 columns, and desktop 3 columns. The grid needs a 1.5rem gap and 1rem padding on all sides.
evals.expected_output: SCSS using project token variables ($break-mobile: 768px, $break-tablet: 900px, $break-desktop: 1200px from styles.scss), NOT hardcoded pixel values. Breakpoint blocks placed after the base selector. Padding uses padding-inline and padding-block.

evals.prompt: Build the SCSS for a new supplier-card component at src/app/pages/suppliers/components/supplier-card/supplier-card.component.scss. It should display a supplier logo image at the top, the supplier name as a heading, contact info below, and have a hover state. The card should be 320px wide.
evals.expected_output: Agent scans src/styles.scss first, finds .c-glass-card engine class, composes using it rather than rewriting glass styles from scratch. Component SCSS only adds layout/content-specific overrides. No .c-* class defined inside the component file. Five-Group Rhythm on any new selectors.

evals.prompt: Add styles to a new notification-banner component at src/app/shared/notification-banner/notification-banner.component.scss. The banner displays a warning message with an icon on the left and a dismiss button on the right. It should sit at the top of the content area and look consistent with the rest of the app.
evals.expected_output: Uses project semantic tokens for warning styling: --bg-warning, --text-warning, --border-warning (from styles.scss :root). Does NOT hardcode colors like #fff3cd or #ffc107. Follows Five-Group Rhythm. Uses logical properties. Looks visually native to the Liquid Glass design system.

evals.prompt: Style the empty-state component for when a user has no recipes yet. It lives at src/app/pages/recipe-builder/components/empty-state/empty-state.component.scss. Show centered content: an icon area at the top, a heading, a short description line, and a call-to-action button area below.
evals.expected_output: Uses project tokens: --color-text-muted or --color-text-muted-light for descriptive text, var(--radius-*) for any rounded elements, consistent with glass design language. Does NOT hardcode colors like #666 or #999. Empty state feels like it belongs in the same app as the other pages.
